blocks.content: It happened again in the girls' bathroom between fourth and fifth period.
A girl named Ashley from 7C was fixing her hair in the mirror and caught Daisy's eye in the reflection instead of turning around.

blocks.speaker: Ashley
blocks.content: Are you the one who's with Kit Jenkins?

blocks.speaker: Ashley
blocks.content: Because Brooke Hadley was asking about him.

blocks.speaker: Ashley
blocks.content: I just meant — are you two like, a thing? Because if you're not—
She said it flat and final. Ashley shrugged and left. Daisy stood at the sink with the water still running.
She turned off the faucet and went to fifth period.
